text:
MODE EVANGELION 2 is a mook published by Gakken Plus on 24 September 2015. It is a collaboration with the female brands mmts and Evangelion. https://www.amazon.co.uk/EVANGELION2-20th-Anniversary-MOOK-Gakken/dp/4056109176 

Overview

It includes information on the Evangelion goods collaborated with each brand, information on fashion items, review articles on the Neon Genesis Evangelion and the Rebuild of Evangelion, a makeup course that teaches how to make makeup in the style of Rei, Asuka, and Mari, how to make sweets based on Angels and characters.

Including within the package were a tote bag constellation pattern tote bag with a constellations motiff, such as a woman holding the Spear of Longinus and a piano and three hair ties, in collaboration with the popular fashion brand mmts. https://www.eva-info.jp/1166
